title: CYLINDER BLOCK — Disassembly (Cont'd) / Inspection

figures_detected.description: Piston pin press stand assembly showing tools KV10116610, KV10116620, and ST13040000 used to disassemble piston and connecting rod
Main bearing beam bolt loosening sequence diagram showing numbered bolt positions on the main bearing beam
Crankcase breather bracket location on the cylinder block, showing bracket and filter mesh
Crankcase breather bracket and filter mesh removed from cylinder block
Measuring inner diameter of piston pin hole using a dial bore gauge / internal micrometer

content_blocks.text: When disassembling piston and connecting rod, use piston pin press stand at room temperature.

steps.text: Remove main bearing beam and crankshaft.
notes: Before removing main bearing beam, measure crankshaft end play (see crankshaft assembly section).
Bolts should be loosened in two or three stages and in the order shown.

steps.text: Remove the crankcase breather bracket. Remove the filter mesh. Clean filter before refitting.
Measure inner diameter of piston pin hole.

items.label: Piston pin hole inner diameter — Standard diameter (CG10DE)
Piston pin hole inner diameter — Standard diameter (CG13DE)
